word: H4456 - מַלְקֹושׁ - malqôwsh - mal-koshe' - Latter rain

sections.paragraph:
Original: מלקושׁ

Transliteration: malqôsh

Phonetic: mal-koshe'

BDB Definition:

  1. latter rain, spring rain
    1. the March and April rains which mature the crops of Palestine

Origin: from H3953

TWOT entry: 1127b

Part(s) of speech: Noun Masculine
